description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular wooden storage chest with a curved, hinged lid and reinforced with two dark metal bands running across the top. The chest features a brass or gold-toned trim around the opening, adding a touch of elegance and durability. The interior is partially filled with gold coins and a metallic key, suggesting it is used for storing valuables or treasures. The wood grain is visible, giving the box a rustic, classic appearance, while the base is slightly wider for stability. The lid is propped open, revealing the contents and the sturdy construction of the box. The overall design is reminiscent of a traditional treasure chest, suitable for decorative or secure storage in urban environments such as garages, shops, or themed public spaces.
description: A medium-sized, curved-lid wooden storage chest with metal bands and brass trim, filled with coins and a key. The chest has a rustic, treasure-like appearance and sturdy construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid, brass-trimmed opening, and visible coins and key inside.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curved wooden lid, metal bands, and partial view of the interior contents.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full curvature of the lid, metal bands, and solid wooden back with no visible opening.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the curved lid, metal bands, and a glimpse of the coins inside.
attribute_lock_mechanism: key lock area (no visible lock engaged)
attribute_placement_location: floor, garage, shop, decorative indoor area
